title: T-040 — R13 identity columns migration on lot/work_order/quality_event/shipment/bom_item placeholder tables
prompt:
# T-040 — R13 identity columns migration on lot/work_order/quality_event/shipment/bom_item placeholder tables

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §10 (Schema 'AI-ready + traceability-ready' od dnia 1 [R13])
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Create empty placeholder business tables (lot, work_order, quality_event, shipment, bom_item) carrying the full R13 identity column set — so that downstream module PRDs (05-WAREHOUSE / 08-PRODUCTION / 11-SHIPPING / 09-QUALITY / 03-TECHNICAL) inherit the columns without retrofit migrations. PRD §10 names these 5 entities verbatim and lists 9 R13 columns.

## Implementation contract
(1) Add packages/db/src/schema/r13-business-tables.ts with five Drizzle tables: lot, workOrder, qualityEvent, shipment, bomItem — each containing only the 9 R13 columns: id UUID PK (v7), external_id TEXT, tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES organizations(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by_user UUID, created_by_device TEXT, app_version TEXT, model_prediction_id UUID NULL, epcis_event_id UUID NULL. (2) Generate migration packages/db/migrations/0009_r13_placeholder_tables.sql with the 5 tables + per-table index on (tenant_id, created_at DESC). (3) Enable RLS on all 5 tables with the same USING/WITH CHECK policy pattern as T-007 (current_setting('app.current_org_id')). (4) Vitest asserts that for each of the 5 tables, all 9 columns are present and tenant_id is NOT NULL.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/r13-business-tables.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/0009_r13_placeholder_tables.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate' completes, then each of lot, work_order, quality_event, shipment, bom_item exists with all 9 R13 columns from §10 (id, external_id, tenant_id, created_at, created_by_user, created_by_device, app_version, model_prediction_id, epcis_event_id) and a (tenant_id, created_at DESC) index
2. Given an INSERT into lot with tenant_id=NULL, when SQL runs, then Postgres rejects with NOT NULL violation on tenant_id (R13 RLS enforcement contract)
3. Given an app-role connection scoped to tenant A and a row INSERT'd into work_order under tenant A, when the same connection later sets app.current_org_id to tenant B and SELECTs from work_order, then 0 rows are returned (RLS isolation via the same policy pattern as T-007)
4. Given 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db typecheck' runs, when the schema barrel re-exports the 5 tables, then their inferred types include model_prediction_id and epcis_event_id as nullable strings (UUID-typed)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/src/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts covering all four ACs before r13-business-tables.ts exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test:integration'

## Risk red lines
- Do not add any business columns beyond the R13 9 — domain columns belong to the consuming module PRDs (01-NPD / 05-WAREHOUSE / etc.)
- Do not skip RLS on these tables — every business table is RLS-default per §5
- Do not change the R13 column list — it is locked by §10 R13 and adding fields later is the migration hell §10 explicitly warns against

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-006
- T-007

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Placeholder tables lot / work_order / quality_event / shipment / bom_item carrying the 9 R13 identity columns + RLS, ready for downstream module PRDs to extend.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §10 R13 says explicitly 'lot, work_order, quality_event, maintenance_event, shipment, bom_item MUSI mieć pola: id/external_id/tenant_id/created_at/created_by_user/created_by_device/app_version/model_prediction_id/epcis_event_id'. We seed 5 of the 6 here (maintenance_event lives in 13-MAINTENANCE PRD); each table starts as the R13 skeleton + RLS to avoid retrofit migrations downstream.

No domain columns (status, qty, allergens, etc.) — those belong to consuming module PRDs

Given an INSERT into lot with tenant_id=NULL, when SQL runs, then Postgres rejects with NOT NULL violation on tenant_id (R13 RLS enforcement contract)

Given an app-role connection scoped to tenant A and a row INSERT'd into work_order under tenant A, when the same connection later sets app.current_org_id to tenant B and SELECTs from work_order, then 0 rows are returned (RLS isolation via the same policy pattern as T-007)

Given 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db typecheck' runs, when the schema barrel re-exports the 5 tables, then their inferred types include model_prediction_id and epcis_event_id as nullable strings (UUID-typed)
